samples.xml_description:
Implement a module for edge detection. Clock signal. Reset signal (active low). Input signal. Output signal indicating a rising edge. Output signal indicating a falling edge. 0 1 State variable. The edge_detect module detects rising and falling edges in the input signal a and generates corresponding output signals rise and down.
  • On the positive edge of the clock signal clk, the module checks the input signal a.
  • If a rising edge is detected, the state variable is updated to ONE, and the rise output signal is set to 1.
  • If a falling edge is detected, the state variable is updated to ZERO, and the down output signal is set to 1.
  • Otherwise, the state remains unchanged, and both output signals are set to 0.
The output signals rise and down are synchronized with the clock signal and are set to 1 only for one clock cycle after a rising or falling edge is detected.
